results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Hero roster and equipment reference page with faction filters, level listings, and gear stat examples; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking hero-related entries.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero names, factions, levels, and gear entries.

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research guide with category tabs, level cost tables, and search for research names; useful for locating research topics and cost structure leads.
results.primary_user_job: Find research categories, names, and badge cost tables.

results.title: Beginner's Guide - Last Z Wiki | How to Start & Essential Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: Starter guide that mentions early heroes, resources, and progression flow; useful as a broad onboarding and hero-adjacent discovery source.
results.primary_user_job: Learn early-game progression and starter hero context.

results.primary_user_job: Find which daily event theme rewards research or hero upgrades.

results.title: Laboratory

search_records.search_notes: Search was restricted to mmediamreza.com and returned several Last Z-specific training-building guides directly relevant to troop progression. These are good discovery leads for cross-validation, but each page should be verified separately before use.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training building guide with unlock requirements, upgrade table, unit cap, speed, and power stats for Shooter units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Shooter Camp upgrades and troop training.

results.title: Rider Camp Guide: Train & Promote Rider Units | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training building guide with level-by-level costs, cap, speed, and power for Rider units.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Rider Camp upgrades and troop training.

results.title: Assaulter Camp Guide - Train Faster & Gain Power | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Training guide for Assaulter units, focused on faster training and power gains.
results.primary_user_job: Plan Assaulter Camp upgrades and troop training.
